note:
Zero hot setups? Zero?! You gotta be kidding me. When was the last time that happened? The answer is: almost never. Listen up, the market is screaming "neutral" right now—and that's fine. This is what a digestion period looks like. There’s no FOMO, no excessive speculative juices flowing. That’s not bearish; it’s perfectly healthy. The lack of red-hot squeezes in our scan this morning isn’t a warning—it’s a reset. **Risk is still on. Full stop. The rotation has been brutal, but it hasn’t been bearish. Big difference.**

Zooming out to the macro picture, we know this market has been playing shell games, rotating leadership like a blackjack dealer shuffling cards. One day it’s crypto, the next day it’s semis, then it’s biotech, and then we’re talking rare earths or some obscure uranium name ripping faces off. The key takeaway? While the market sorts itself out, patience and positioning are everything. If you’ve been overtrading, now’s the time to step back and let the portfolio work. This isn’t the time for heroes—it’s the time for snipers.

The zero-squeeze data backs that up. What it tells us is that momentum names, as a group, are taking a breather. That said, our positions have some serious heat. Look at $BMNR in crypto land, up 170% on one entry and 88% on another. That’s just domination. And how about $MP, still riding its rare earths wave, up over 120%? That’s leadership right there. And don’t sleep on $UAMY either—100% gain and already half out. These are the names telling you where active traders are still finding edge. The squeeze scan may be quiet today, but our portfolio is the cheat code to what’s still moving.

Speaking of the portfolio, here’s what’s actionable. Biotechs like $VKTX are quietly hanging in there—still up 43% and full position. The trade is alive and well if you’re late to the party. And $ASTS in space? I get it, it’s sitting flat, but you better not sleep on this one. If space gets rolling again, it’s names like $ASTS that lead the charge. Also, don’t overlook $AI and $SE. The software space has been sitting in this weird limbo for weeks. But when that bullish breakout comes—and I say *when*, not *if*—you’ll want to be strapped in.

Today, keep your eyes glued to two spots on the radar: crypto and uranium. $COIN hit the 2x mark and we’ve already taken half off, but the fact it’s still charging higher? The market is telling us something. Are we listening? Same goes for uranium plays like $UEC and $UUUU; the nuclear theme could easily heat back up. If you’re looking for new blood, you won’t have to wait long. Stay locked in, stay sharp.
